title: Aaib Report Discus B G Djmd Standard Cir

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content:
AAIB Report: Discus B, G-DJMD / Standard Cirrus, G-DCTB. Fatal accident involving Discus B, G-DJMD and Standard Cirrus, G-DCTB, Hinton-in-the-Hedges Airfield, Northamptonshire, 25 May 2024

AAIB investigation to Discus B, G-DJMD / Standard Cirrus, G-DCTB. Discus B (G-DJMD) and Standard Cirrus (G-DCTB), collided while landing at Hinton-in-the-Hedges Airfield,  Northamptonshire, 25 May 2024

The AAIB has sent a team to Portmoak, Kinross. A team of inspectors has been sent to Portmoak, Kinross, to begin investigating a light aircraft accident which occurred on Monday 27 October

sections.heading: Context
sections.content: These developments affect aviation connectivity, airspace management, and surface access to airports. Readers interested in Scottish aviation heritage may find parallels in the industrial and operational history documented in our research volumes.
